prompt: Working on a terminal app in Go with bubbletea v2 and lipgloss v2 (charm.land/* imports). I want a split-pane layout: a narrow left panel (about 25 chars wide) showing a list of servers using the bubbles list component, and a wider right panel showing details about the selected server. When I press Tab it should switch which panel has focus — the active one gets a rounded purple border, the inactive one gets a dim gray rounded border. Arrow keys should only affect the focused panel. Currently I just have an empty model struct.
assertions: Model has a focusedPane field (or equivalent) to track which pane is active
Defines two distinct border styles — one for focused (colored) and one for blurred (dim/gray)
Tab key toggles the active pane
Key events are only forwarded to the currently focused component
Uses lipgloss.JoinHorizontal to place the two panes side by side
Handles tea.WindowSizeMsg and calls list.SetSize (or equivalent) to resize components
Left panel has a fixed or constrained width around 25 characters
